---
title: "Annotated Circuit Diagrams"
subtitle: "Progressive reveal demo"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, custom.scss]
    slide-number: true
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    transition: fade
---

## KVL: Mesh Analysis

::: {layout="[45,55]"}

```{=html}
<svg style="display:block; max-height:700px;" viewBox="0 0 264 323" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" xmlns:s="https://github.com/nturley/netlistsvg" height="95%">
  <defs>
    <marker id="meshArrow" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="5" refX="6" refY="2.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 6 2.5, 0 5" fill="#C0392B"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <style>svg {
    stroke: #2C3E50;
    fill: none;
    stroke-width: 1.5;
  }
  line {
    stroke-linecap: square;
    stroke-width: 1.5;
  }
  text {
    fill: #2C3E50;
    stroke: none;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: bold;
    font-family: "Helvetica Neue", "Helvetica", sans-serif;
  }
  .nodelabel {
    text-anchor: middle;
  }
  .inputPortLabel {
    text-anchor: end;
  }
  .splitjoinBody {
    fill: #2C3E50;
  }
  .symbol {
    stroke-linejoin: round;
    stroke-linecap: round;
    stroke-width: 2;
  }
  .connect {
    stroke-width: 1.5;
  }
  .detail {
    stroke-linejoin: round;
    stroke-linecap: round;
    stroke-width: 1.5;
  }
  /* Component colors */
  .symbol.cell_R_prec { stroke: #E67E22; stroke-width: 2.5; }
  .connect.cell_R_prec { stroke: #E67E22; }
  text.cell_R_prec { fill: #E67E22; }
  .symbol.cell_R_T { stroke: #C0392B; stroke-width: 2.5; }
  .connect.cell_R_T { stroke: #C0392B; }
  text.cell_R_T { fill: #C0392B; }
  .symbol.cell_Buffer { stroke: #27AE60; stroke-width: 2.5; fill: #E8F5E9; }
  .detail.cell_Buffer { stroke: #27AE60; }
  .connect.cell_Buffer { stroke: #27AE60; }
  text.cell_Buffer { fill: #27AE60; }
  .symbol.cell_V_exc { stroke: #2C3E50; stroke-width: 2; }
  .detail.cell_V_exc { stroke: #2C3E50; }
  text.cell_V_exc { fill: #2C3E50; }</style>
  <g s:type="voltage_source" s:width="40" s:height="60" transform="translate(12,126)" id="cell_Vs">
    <s:alias val="v"/>
    <text x="42" y="22" s:attribute="ref" class="cell_Vs">Vs</text>
    <text x="42" y="40" s:attribute="value" class="cell_Vs"></text>
    <circle cx="20" cy="30" r="16" class="symbol cell_Vs"/>
    <path d="M17,20 H23 M20,17 V23" class="detail cell_Vs"/>
    <path d="M17,38 H23" class="detail cell_Vs"/>
    <path d="M20,0 V14 M20,46 V60" class="connect cell_Vs"/>
    <g s:x="20" s:y="0" s:pid="+" s:position="top"/>
    <g s:x="20" s:y="60" s:pid="-" s:position="bottom"/>
  </g>
  <g s:type="resistor_h" s:width="120" s:height="20" transform="translate(42,26)" id="cell_R1">
    <s:alias val="r_h"/>
    <text class="nodelabel cell_R1" x="60" y="-8" s:attribute="ref">R1</text>
    <text class="nodelabel cell_R1" x="60" y="30" s:attribute="value"></text>
    <path d="M30,10 L36,4 42,16 48,4 54,16 60,4 66,16 72,4 78,16 84,4 90,10" class="symbol cell_R1"/>
    <path d="M0,10 H30 M90,10 H120" class="connect cell_R1"/>
    <g s:x="0" s:y="10" s:pid="A" s:position="left"/>
    <g s:x="120" s:y="10" s:pid="B" s:position="right"/>
  </g>
  <g s:type="resistor_v" s:width="80" s:height="60" transform="translate(172,186)" id="cell_R2">
    <s:alias val="r_v"/>
    <text x="20" y="33" s:attribute="ref" class="cell_R2">R2</text>
    <text x="20" y="46" s:attribute="value" class="cell_R2"></text>
    <path d="M10,10 L15,15 5,21 15,27 5,33 15,39 5,45 10,50" class="symbol cell_R2"/>
    <path d="M10,0 V10 M10,50 V60" class="connect cell_R2"/>
    <g s:x="10" s:y="0" s:pid="A" s:position="top"/>
    <g s:x="10" s:y="60" s:pid="B" s:position="bottom"/>
  </g>
  <g s:type="gnd" s:width="20" s:height="30" transform="translate(22,281)" id="cell_GND">
    <s:alias val="gnd"/>
    <path d="M0,0 H20 M3,5 H17 M7,10 H13 M10,0 V-15" class="cell_GND"/>
    <g s:x="10" s:y="-15" s:pid="A" s:position="top"/>
  </g>
  <line x1="42" x2="32" y1="36" y2="36" class="net_2"/>
  <line x1="32" x2="32" y1="36" y2="126" class="net_2"/>
  <line x1="162" x2="182" y1="36" y2="36" class="net_3"/>
  <line x1="182" x2="182" y1="36" y2="186" class="net_3"/>
  <line x1="32" x2="32" y1="186" y2="266" class="net_4"/>
  <line x1="182" x2="182" y1="246" y2="256" class="net_4"/>
  <line x1="182" x2="32" y1="256" y2="256" class="net_4"/>
  <circle cx="32" cy="256" r="2" style="fill:#000" class="net_4"/>
  <line x1="32" x2="32" y1="256" y2="266" class="net_4"/>

  <!-- === FRAGMENT 1: Node labels === -->
  <g class="fragment" data-fragment-index="0">
    <text x="24.0" y="40.0" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#27AE60" text-anchor="end">a</text>
    <text x="190.0" y="40.0" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#27AE60">b</text>
    <text x="24.0" y="270.0" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#27AE60" text-anchor="end">d</text>
    <text x="190.0" y="270.0" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#27AE60">c</text>
  </g>

  <!-- === FRAGMENT 2: Mesh current (clockwise ellipse inside loop) === -->
  <g class="fragment" data-fragment-index="1">
    <path d="M131.5,98.5
             A35.0,75.0 0 1,1 82.5,98.5"
          stroke="#C0392B" stroke-width="1.2" fill="none"
          marker-end="url(#meshArrow)"/>
    <text x="107.0" y="156.0" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#C0392B"
          text-anchor="middle" font-style="italic">I</text>
  </g>

  <!-- === FRAGMENT 3: Voltage polarity marks (below R1, right of R2) === -->
  <g class="fragment" data-fragment-index="2">
    <text x="72.0" y="60.0" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#2980B9">+</text>
    <text x="132.0" y="60.0" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#2980B9">−</text>
    <text x="102.0" y="74.0" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#2980B9" text-anchor="middle">V_R1</text>

    <text x="166.0" y="200.0" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#2980B9" text-anchor="end">+</text>
    <text x="166.0" y="242.0" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#2980B9" text-anchor="end">−</text>
    <text x="166.0" y="220.0" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#2980B9" text-anchor="end">V_R2</text>
  </g>
</svg>

```

:::{}

::: {.fragment data-fragment-index="3"}
::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
## KVL (clockwise)
$$-V_s + V_{R_1} + V_{R_2} = 0$$
:::
:::

::: {.fragment data-fragment-index="4"}
::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
## Substituting Ohm's law
$$-V_s + IR_1 + IR_2 = 0$$
:::
:::

::: {.fragment data-fragment-index="5"}
::: {.callout-tip appearance="minimal"}
## Solving for current
$$\boxed{I = \frac{V_s}{R_1 + R_2}}$$
Series resistors: currents equal, voltages add.
:::
:::

:::

:::
